stage_distribution._certified_209_comment: Source has 14 Certified Letter Notice + 4 Pending Hearing + 4 Hearing Notice rows. After folding hearing-related labels into certified_209 (Texas §209 sub-states), each Pending Hearing + Hearing Notice pair at the same property+category+date dedupes to one row (same canonical violation viewed from two Vantaca process steps). Net: 14 + 4 = ~18.

lakes-pine-forest-2026-05.pdf._comment: PDF extraction is AI-based and non-deterministic. Tolerance is wide to catch real failures (zero rows, truncation, total miss) without flapping on normal model variance. CSV path is the deterministic one — if a deployment needs an exact count check, use CSV.
